title: Hemorrhoid preparation and sheets
abstract: A pharmaceutical composition for the treatment of hemorrhoids, sheets, methods of making and using the same.
claims:
Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: A composition for treating hemorrhoids, comprising: an analgesic, a vasoconstrictor, an emollient, and a cooling agent, wherein the composition does not comprise a lipophilic skin protectant. A composition for treating hemorrhoids, consisting of: an analgesic, a vasoconstrictor, an emollient, a cooling agent, optionally, a solvent, optionally, an acidulant, optionally, an antioxidant, optionally, a preservative, and optionally, a chelating agent, wherein the composition does not comprise a lipophilic skin protectant. A composition for treating hemorrhoids, consisting of: pramoxine hydrochloride, phenylephrine hydrochloride, glycerin, propylene glycol, menthol, water, polysorbate 80, sodium citrate, citric acid, 

 butylated hydroxyanisole, sodium benzoate, methyl paraben, propyl paraben, and disodium EDTA, wherein the composition does not comprise a lipophilic skin protectant. 4. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the analgesic comprises pramoxine hydrochloride, the vasoconstrictor comprises phenylephrine hydrochloride; the emollient comprises glycerin and propylene glycol, the cooling agent comprises menthol, the solvent comprises water, the non-ionic surfactant comprises polysorbate 80, the acidulant comprises sodium citrate and citric acid, the antioxidant comprises butylated hydroxyanisole, the preservative comprises sodium benzoate, methyl paraben and propyl paraben, and the chelating agent comprises disodium EDTA. 5. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the analgesic is present in an amount of 0.25-20% by weight, the vasoconstrictor is present in an amount of 0.005-1.25% by weight; the emollient is present in an amount of 1.0-40% by weight, the cooling agent is present in an amount of 0.05-0.1 % by weight, the solvent is present in an amount of 70-90% by weight, the non-ionic surfactant is present in an amount of 0.5-5.0% by weight, the acidulant is present in an amount of 0.10-0.50% by weight, the antioxidant is present in an amount of 0.01-0.10% by weight, the preservative is present in an amount of 0.01-0.25% by weight, and 

 the chelating agent is present in an amount of 0.05-0.20% by weight. 6. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the analgesic comprises at least one member selected from the group consisting of benzocaine, benzyl alcohol, dibucaine, dibucaine hydrochloride, diclonine hydrochloride, lidocaine, pramoxine hydrochloride, tetracaine and tetracaine hydrochloride. 7. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the analgesic is present in an amount of 0.25-20% by weight. 8. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the analgesic is present in an amount of 0.5-2.0% by weight. 9. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the vasoconstrictor comprises at least one member selected from the group consisting of ephedrine sulfate, epinephrine, epinephrine hydrochloride and phenylephrine hydrochloride. 10. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the vasoconstrictor is present in an amount of 0.005-1.25% by weight. 11. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the vasoconstrictor is present in an amount of 0.10-0.50% by weight. 12. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the emollient comprises at least one member selected from the group consisting of dipropylene glycol, hexylene glycol, butylene glycol, propylene glycol and glycerin. 13. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the emollient is present in an amount of 1.0-40% by weight. 14. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the cooling agent comprises at least one member selected from the group consisting of menthol, eucalyptol, camphor and juniper tar. 15. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the cooling agent is present in an amount of 0.05-0.1 % by weight. 16. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, further comprising a solvent. 17. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the solvent comprises at least one member selected from the group consisting of water, glycerin, propylene glycol and polyethylene glycol. 18. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the solvent is present in an amount of 70-90% by weight. 9. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, further comprising a non-ionic surfactant. 20. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the non-ionic surfactant comprises at least one member selected from the group consisting of ethoxylated castor oil, polysorbate 20, polysorbate 60 and polysorbate 80. 21. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the non-ionic surfactant is present in an amount of 0.5-5.0% by weight. 22. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, further comprising an acidulant. 23. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the acidulant comprises at least one member selected from the group consisting of sodium citrate and citric acid. 24. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the acidulant is present in an amount of 0.10-0.50% by weight. 25. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, further comprising an antioxidant. 26. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the antioxidant comprises at least one member selected from the group consisting of butylated hydroxyanisole, butylated hydroxyl toluene and propyl gallate. 27. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the antioxidant is present in an amount of 0.01-0.10% by weight. 28. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, further comprising a preservative. 29. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the preservative comprises at least one member selected from the group consisting of methyl paraben, propyl paraben, sodium benzoate, diazolidinyl urea and butylated hydroxyanisole. 30. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the preservative is present in an amount of 0.01-0.25% by weight. 31. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, further comprising a chelating agent. 32. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the chelating agent comprises disodium EDTA. 33. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the chelating agent is present in an amount of 0.05-0.20% by weight. 34. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the analgesic comprises pramoxine hydrochloride, the vasoconstrictor comprises phenylephrine hydrochloride; the emollient comprises glycerin, and the cooling agent comprises menthol. 35. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, further comprising a solvent, a non-ionic surfactant, an acidulant, an antioxidant, a preservative, and a chelating agent. 36. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the solvent comprises water, propylene glycol and polyethylene glycol. 37. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the water, propylene glycol and polyethylene glycol are present in a ratio of 3:2:1. 38. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the water, propylene glycol and polyethylene glycol are present in a ratio of 1 :1 :1. 39. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the composition is formulated as a member selected from the group consisting of a solution, a suppository, an ointment or an impregnated sheet. 40. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the composition is not a cream. 41. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the composition is clear. 42. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the cooling agent is solubilized as a microemulsion. 43. The composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the composition does not comprise petrolatum, witch hazel, cetyl alcohol, acyclic alcohols nor monohydric aliphatic alcohols. 44. A sheet for treating hemorrhoids, wherein the sheet is impregnated with a composition of any of the preceding claims. 45. The sheet for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the sheet is dispersible. 46. A method of making the composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, comprising: adding an antioxidant to a non-ionic surfactant and a first emollient in a first tank, to form a first mixture; 

 mixing the first mixture; adding a first preservative and a cooling agent to the first mixture in the first tank, to form a second mixture; mixing the second mixture; adding a solvent to a second emollient, different from the first emollient, in a second tank, to form a third mixture; adding a chelating agent, a second preservative, different from the first preservative, and an acidulant to the third mixture in the second tank, to form a fourth mixture; mixing the fourth mixture; adding an analgesic and a vasoconstrictor to the fourth mixture in the second tank, to form a fifth mixture; mixing the fifth mixture; adding the second mixture to the fifth mixture in the second tank, to form a final mixture; mixing the final mixture to form the composition for treating hemorrhoids. 47. The method of making a composition for treating hemorrhoids of any of the preceding claims, wherein the antioxidant comprises butylated hydroxyanisole, the non-ionic surfactant comprises polysorbate 80, the first emollient comprises propylene glycol, the first preservative comprises a mixture of methyl paraben and propyl paraben, the cooling agent comprises menthol, the solvent comprises water, the second emollient comprises glycerin, the chelating agent comprises EDTA, the second preservative comprises sodium benzoate, the acidulant comprises a mixture of sodium citrate and citric acid, the analgesic comprises pramoxine hydrochloride, and the vasoconstrictor comprises phenylephrine hydrochloride. 48. The composition of any of the preceding claims for use in treating hemorrhoids. 49. The sheet of any of the preceding claims for use in treating hemorrhoids.
